landing.title: Lift your rewards with AI
landing.subtitle: ยกระดับทุกแต้มบัตรเครดิตของคุณ
landing.reassurance: Free · No sign-up · Results in 10 seconds

howItWorks.step2: AI calculates the cards that maximize your points

selector.title: Find the right card
selector.subtitle: Tell us your spend and your goal — we'll calculate the best-earning cards in 10 seconds.
selector.monthlySpendHint: Total across all cards, in THB per month.
selector.categoriesLabel: Break down by category (drag to adjust)
selector.currentCardsHint: You can skip this — card search ships in a later version.

errors.category_sum_mismatch: Categories must sum close to your monthly total.
errors.submitFailed: Could not submit — please try again.

results.title: Your results
results.blurredMessage: Enter your email to unlock the full stack
results.monthsToGoalBanner: 💡 At your current spend, you'll reach {targetPoints} {currency} in {months} months
results.saveHint: Enter an email above to save these results

results.title: Your results
results.emailGateTitle: Enter your email to unlock full results

cards.indexSubtitle: Editorial reviews and earn-rate data, maintained by Loftly
cards.emptyState: No cards in the catalog yet
cards.loadError: Couldn't load the card catalog. Please try again.
cards.notFoundBody: This card may have been retired, or the URL is misspelled. Head back to the catalog to browse all cards.
cards.noValuation: No valuation available for this currency yet
cards.disclaimer: Data maintained by Loftly, sourced from bank sites as of the update date — actual terms may change.

valuations.indexSubtitle: Loftly samples real redemptions and publishes the 80th percentile — not the mean, not the median.
valuations.notFoundBody: This currency may have been retired, or the URL is misspelled — head back to all 8 currencies.

detail.methodologyBody: We take the 80th percentile across {samples} recent redemptions — the level a deliberate optimizer can reasonably hit, not the average and not the fantasy best-case.

onboarding.title: Get started with Loftly
onboarding.subtitle: Choose how you'd like to sign in to manage your consents and results.
onboarding.mockNotice: Real OAuth isn't wired up yet — the buttons below are mocks so the UX flow can be walked end to end.

consent.pageTitle: Loftly would like to use your data to
consent.optimizationRequiredError: Consent for core service is required to continue
consent.saveError: Couldn't save your consent. Please try again.

optimization.title: Core service (Optimization)
optimization.description: Required: we use your spend data to calculate and recommend the best-earning cards.

marketing.title: Marketing
marketing.description: Send promotional emails, new-card news, and partner offers.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Collect anonymized usage stats to improve the user experience.

sharing.title: Sharing with partners
sharing.description: Share aggregated, anonymized stats with partner banks to inform product design.

dataExport.title: Download your personal data (PDPA)
dataExport.intro: You have the right to a copy of your data under PDPA §7 — we'll package it as JSON + CSV and deliver a download link within 24 hours.
dataExport.notAvailableBody: Self-service data export will be available after the Month 3 soft-launch — in the meantime, contact us for a manual export.
dataExport.errorGeneric: Couldn't submit your request — please try again

delete.title: Delete your account
delete.warningBody: You can cancel any time during the grace period — after 14 days your data is permanently erased per PDPA §7.
delete.emailConfirmLabel: Type your registered email (to confirm identity)
delete.pendingBody: Your data will be erased in
delete.cancelledNotice: Deletion cancelled — your account is active.
delete.completedNotice: Your account has been permanently deleted.
delete.legalHoldBody: Consent records and commission accounting are retained for 7 years per PDPA and accounting regulations.
delete.notAvailableBody: Self-service account deletion will be available after the Month 3 soft-launch — contact us for an early-deletion request.
delete.errorGeneric: Couldn't submit your request — please try again

legal.affiliateDisclosureInline: Loftly earns commission from the bank — no extra cost to you
legal.affiliateDisclosureFull: Loftly earns a commission when you apply for a card through our links, at no extra cost to you. Our current partners include MoneyGuru, KTC, and UOB — we disclose all commercial relationships so you can evaluate our recommendations neutrally. Our analyses and scores are not adjusted in favor of any specific partner.

magicLink.formLabel: Get a login link by email
magicLink.promptTitle: Enter your email to unlock the full stack
magicLink.sentMessage: We sent a link to {email}. Check your inbox — it's valid for 15 minutes.
magicLink.invalidEmail: That doesn't look like a valid email.
magicLink.unknownError: Couldn't send the link — please try again.
magicLink.expiredBody: Magic links are valid for 15 minutes and can only be used once. Request a fresh link to continue.
